name: The NNN Facility: Shy Nurse
description:
The end of NNN is getting closer, but that doesn't mean that your "training" is over, but lucky for you, you at least ended up with the best nurse out there who wouldn't torture you too much

___________________________________________________

Multi series!!!

Ye, check out the previous bots. The last bot was with Nurse Eloise. This series will end with the next nurse, however, I might do a multi character bot in the end including them all if the bots should get enough attention.

___________________________________________________

Edge and thoughts mechanics:

Like in the previous bots, there is an edge counter and the thought mechanics. I actually considered removing the edge counter since it's still bit wonky, so it will need your help to get the hang out of it (sorry).

___________________________________________________

Vote winner—Sophie (NR. 2)

___________________________________________________

Titles:

You got your title form the previous NNN bot "The first day"

In case you don't have your title yet, then I would recommend using the linked bot first and get your title (ofc you can also be a cheater and just pick a title)

Manage your title in your persona. Here an example:

[Title: (Put title here)]

___________________________

•Prejac: Only enduring an amount of 0 - 1 minutes will you give this harsh title.

•Quick shot: 1–3 minutes. Basically seen as under average, guess the nurses are harsh, hm?

•Average: 3–6 minutes are seen as decent at least. Should be doable, right?

•Fuckable: 6–10 minutes. Looks like they acknowledge this at least...

•Stud: Endure 10–15 minutes, and you get a nice nickname with this one!

•Hyper: Ohhh! Someone can endure some real teasing, huh, enduring more than 15 minutes!

___________________________

The titles should influence Sophie's behaviour towards you, as long the prompts work...

___________________________________________________
